name: Lentil Burgers
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine dried lentils and water in a saucepan; bring to a boil over medium-high heat.
2. Cover, reduce heat, and simmer for 30 minutes.
3. Cook, uncovered, for an additional 10-15 minutes until the water is absorbed and lentils are tender. Drain if necessary.
4. Stir in ketchup, garlic powder, chopped onion, Egg Beaters®, salt, whole wheat flour, and vegetable oil. Shape into 8 patties and refrigerate for 1 hour.
5. Heat 1 tablespoon of oil in a skillet over medium-high heat. Fry the patties for 1-2 minutes on each side until golden brown.
6. Drain on paper towels. Repeat the procedure for the remaining patties.
7. Serve on hamburger buns with your choice of toppings. Good with A-1 Sauce.
